      OAuth20Service DefaultApi20.createService​(String apiKey, String apiSecret, String callback, String defaultScope, String responseType, OutputStream debugStream, String userAgent, HttpClientConfig httpClientConfig, HttpClient httpClient)
      Crée l'instance de service OAuth 2.0.
      OAuth20Service DefaultApi20.createService​(String apiKey, String apiSecret, String callback, String defaultScope, String responseType, OutputStream debugStream, String userAgent, HttpClientConfig httpClientConfig, HttpClient httpClient, DPoPProofCreator dpopProofCreator)
      Crée l'instance de service OAuth 2.0 supportant DPoP.

      Crée un client HTTP à partir d'une configuration.
